name: dashboard
purpose: Per-operator workflow dashboard. Hydrated deterministically by DashboardRender — calls existing ProjectPinger / Twin / Pm agents with static inputs (no LLM round-trip), assembles JSON outputs into a self-contained HTML page rendered to ~/.brainstem/neighborhoods/microsoft-365-team/<handle>/dashboard.html.
_note: Per kernel rapplication-sdk.md best practice: this rapplication does not duplicate brainstem agent logic — it is a deterministic HTML view OVER the existing agents.
